title: sign_prehash dual-RNG use needs explaining comment
description: ecdsa_native.rs sign_prehash calls wc_ecc_set_rng(key, &mut rng) and then passes &mut rng again as the RNG argument to wc_ecc_sign_hash. Both references point to the same RNG object. wolfCrypt uses the key-attached RNG for scalar blinding and the call-site RNG for nonce generation; using the same object for both is allowed by wolfCrypt but is not obvious. A reviewer or future maintainer will suspect aliasing or a redundant call. Fix: add a comment at the wc_ecc_sign_hash call explaining that wolfCrypt accepts the same RNG for both blinding and nonce generation, and that this is intentional.
